title: Bridge Essay: Contemplation: Its Cultivation and Culmination Through the Buddhist Glasses.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Liberation/Enlightenment** (Phase 15) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Liberation/Enlightenment to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Contemplation: Its Cultivation and Culmination Through the Buddhist Glasses.** — Front Psychol. PMID: 35449693. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2021.800281. Buddhist account of consciousness provides anew way of looking into contemplation, where absorption into meditation does not only bring in changes in the neural level but in the very personality of the individual, turning him into agood human being. The Buddhists recommend the practice of vipassanā, literally meaning insight but actually standing for the realization of the supreme enlightenment breaking off all the internal fetters through the practice of seven different types of purity, such
